title: Smoky Tapioca Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry made with smoky flavor and tapioca, perfect for a snack or lunch.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and bell pepper and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes, or until they begin to soften.
Add the garlic and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the cooked tapioca pearls and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, or until they are well coated with the vegetables and oil.
Add the cubed smoky tofu and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes, or until it is well coated with the vegetables and oil.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, honey, and sesame oil.
Pour the sauce over the tofu and vegetables and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes, or until the sauce is bubbly and slightly thickened.
Serve hot and garnish with sesame seeds and chopped green onions, if desired.
